overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval stone archway into a sunlit cobblestone village street, passing villagers, and entering a timber-framed building to ascend a dark wooden staircase. The scene transitions from enclosed tunnel to open street to interior space.

events.description: villager NPC walks past Geralt from left to right in the archway
exiting the stone tunnel into the bright open village street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the stone archway tunnel toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: male villager in green tunic walking past Geralt from left to right

entered.detail: large stone brick archway forming a covered passage
rough stone and brick walls with weathered texture
dark wooden beams and planks forming the tunnel roof
black iron lanterns mounted on the tunnel walls
uneven cobblestone pavement with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands in a stone archway tunnel as a villager passes by. He walks forward through the enclosed passage with wooden ceiling beams and iron wall sconces, approaching the bright exit at the far end where sunlight becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village main street with timber-framed houses

events.description: emerging from tunnel into open sunlit village street
Geralt turns right toward a building entrance with wooden stairs

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks down the sunlit cobblestone street passing villagers and medieval buildings on both sides

notable_agents.action: villager in orange tunic standing near building entrance
group of villagers walking along the street in the distance

entered.detail: wide cobblestone road winding through the village
traditional medieval half-timbered building with dark wooden beams
weathered stone building with peeling plaster and red brick patches
simple wooden railing along the left side of the street
cluster of red-tiled roofs and gables visible down the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, Geralt enters a sunlit medieval village street lined with timber-framed houses and stone buildings. He walks past villagers going about their business, with a wooden fence on the left and various NPCs visible ahead. The cobblestone street stretches toward distant red-roofed buildings under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow interior stairwell of stone building

events.description: entering dark building interior from the bright street
beginning to ascend the wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns right, enters the dark building doorway, and climbs the steep wooden staircase into the upper levels

entered.detail: shadowed entrance leading from the street into the building
steep dark wooden staircase with worn steps
rough stone walls inside the building stairwell
heavy timber beams supporting the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: Turning right from the street, Geralt enters a dark stone building and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase. The interior is dimly lit with rough stone walls and heavy timber beams, contrasting sharply with the bright exterior. Light filters down from an opening at the top of the stairs as he climbs upward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim stone tunnel into a bright medieval village before descending into a dark interior. It begins within an enclosed passage featuring wooden ceiling beams and iron sconces, moving forward as the light intensifies toward a bright exit. As Geralt emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a sunlit cobblestone street lined with timber-framed houses and active villagers under a clear blue sky. The camera then shifts from the open air as he turns right into a dark stone building, where the bright daylight is replaced by the dim glow of a rough-walled interior. Finally, the movement carries him upward along a steep wooden staircase, following the light filtering down from an opening at the top.
